title: CS50: Introduction to Computer Science
subject: Computer Science
description: Harvard’s famous intro to CS—algorithms, data structures, web programming, and more. Free to audit on edX.

title: Introduction to Computer Science and Programming Using Python
subject: Computer Science
description: MITx course covering computational thinking and Python. Part of the MicroMasters path; content is free to audit.

title: Algorithms Specialization
subject: Computer Science
description: Divide and conquer, graph algorithms, greedy methods, and dynamic programming via Coursera.

title: General Philosophy (podcast series)
subject: Humanities
description: Oxford’s official “General Philosophy” audio series—intro-level lectures you can follow like a structured course.
freeNote: Supplement with department podcasts and open materials

title: Natural Sciences (undergraduate course hub)
subject: Life Sciences
description: Official undergraduate hub for Natural Sciences, including biological science pathways, structure, and how to explore options.
freeNote: Mix of lectures and reading lists

title: The Science of Well-Being
subject: Psychology
description: Popular Yale course on happiness and habits, available free on Coursera.

title: Algorithms, Part I
subject: Computer Science
description: Data structures and algorithms in Java; free on Coursera (audit).

title: Mathematics for Machine Learning
subject: Data Science
description: Linear algebra, multivariate calculus, and PCA for ML—Coursera specialization.

title: Self-Driving Cars with Duckietown
subject: Data Science
description: Hands-on ETHx MOOC on autonomy and machine learning using Python, ROS, and simulation—open on edX.

title: SLIIT — Open Learning & Short Courses
subject: Computer Science
description: Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology offers various programs; check their open/short course listings for free or low-cost options.
freeNote: Verify current free offerings on the official site

title: UCSC — External Degrees & Open Learning
university: University of Colombo School of Computing (UCSC)
subject: Computer Science
description: UCSC (often referenced alongside Colombo computing programs) publishes degree and external program information; look for MOOCs or public seminars.
freeNote: Check for public lectures and open resources

title: Statistics with R Specialization
subject: Mathematics
description: Introductory statistics using R on Coursera.

title: Introduction to Corporate Finance
subject: Business
description: Wharton course on Coursera covering time value of money and valuation basics.

title: Lessons from Ebola: Preventing the Next Pandemic
subject: Health & Medicine
description: HarvardX public-health course on outbreaks, response, and health systems—free to audit on edX.

title: Neural Networks for Machine Learning
subject: Artificial Intelligence
description: Classic deep learning course (legacy) and newer U of T offerings on Coursera/edX.

title: Mathematics Institute — Public Lectures
subject: Mathematics
description: Oxford Mathematics public lectures and recorded seminars (YouTube and official pages).

title: Machine Learning (Andrew Ng)
subject: Artificial Intelligence
description: Foundational ML course—widely used introduction; free audit on DeepLearning.AI / Coursera.

title: Data Science for Construction, Architecture and Engineering
subject: Data Science
description: NUS MOOC on edX: Python, Pandas, visualization, and basic ML applied to the built environment—free to audit.
